DrugDiscoveryReceptors._comment: Tier-1 cache for services/drug_discovery_pipeline.py's receptor-prep step. Each entry is a REAL, precomputed AutoDock Vina receptor (PDBQT) + blind-docking box for a curated target (see knowledge/target_synonyms.json), generated once via services/receptor_prep_engine.py against the actual AlphaFold DB structure — not fabricated data. A cache hit here skips the ~10-45s mk_prepare_receptor subprocess entirely.

P06821.canonical_name: Influenza A virus Matrix protein 2 (M2 proton channel)

DrugDiscoveryDocking._comment: Tier-1 cache for services/drug_discovery_pipeline.py's per-candidate screening dock_ligand() calls. Each entry is a REAL AutoDock Vina docking result (services/docking_engine.py's dock_ligand output, unmodified) for a curated drug_library.json candidate against a curated target's precomputed receptor (see DrugDiscoveryReceptors), at the exhaustiveness DrugDiscoveryPlanner.plan() picks by default for that target. Key shape: '{uniprot_id}:{strategy_id}:{drug_name}'. Generated once via a one-time offline script — not fabricated data.
